creator: le.englund@trollhattan.mail.telia.com
text:
Complier traps and exits then L2 cache is enabled, system BIOS is
cached, c000 - c400 and c800 - cc00 are cached.

Fix: 

Look at How to repeat the problem. There you have all you need.
How-To-Repeat: The problem disapers then the parameters above are disabled, and
reapers then enabled. My systemboard is an Acer Aopen AP53, 
BIOS level 2.A0.
